description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a business fiber internet plan with at least 500 Mbps download speed, a 99.9% uptime SLA, and a static IP option, then add the lowest‑priced matching plan to a quote or cart.

tasks.instruction: Configure an SD-WAN solution for three office locations with bandwidths of 200 Mbps, 100 Mbps, and 50 Mbps, choosing the lower‑priced wired access option at each site, including managed routers at all sites, keeping the total estimated monthly cost under $2,000, and then save the configuration to a quote.

target_names: NY Site 200 Mbps Broadband + Managed Router
Chicago Site 100 Mbps Broadband + Managed Router
Dallas Site 50 Mbps Broadband + Managed Router

tasks.instruction: Select a shared business mobile plan that supports 25 lines and at least 50 GB of shared data, configure it for 25 lines with international roaming enabled on exactly 5 lines, choose the lowest‑priced mid‑tier phone under $400 for all lines, and add the configuration to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Choose the lowest‑priced hosted VoIP plan that supports call center agents and call recording for 12 users (with at least 4 as call center seats), select the term with the lowest monthly price per user, assign the lowest‑priced desk phone costing at most $120 to all users, enable call recording for the call center seats, and add the solution to the cart.

tasks.instruction: From the checkout page for any selected internet plan, enter the required business and contact information, then choose a standard installation appointment within the next 30 days in a morning 9:00 AM–12:00 PM time window and continue to the order review.

tasks.instruction: From the managed firewall options, select the lowest‑priced tier that includes both intrusion prevention (IPS) and 24/7 monitoring with a monthly price under $300, configure it for a single site if a quantity is required, and add it to your services bundle or cart.

tasks.instruction: Using the coverage checker for two different business locations, pick a primary business fiber internet plan with at least 200 Mbps download at the location where both fiber and wireless are available, then choose the lowest‑priced wireless backup plan with at least 25 Mbps download at the location where only wireless is available, and add both services to the same quote or cart.

tasks.instruction: In the support section, open a new ticket for a network or internet issue at the branch located in Fairview, set the priority to high, describe a total internet outage affecting all users since this morning, provide the required contact details, and submit the ticket.

expected_values.subject: Total Internet Outage at West Office
expected_values.description: No connectivity since 8:00 AM; all users unable to access external sites.

tasks.instruction: From your account’s services list, upgrade your existing 100 Mbps business internet service to the next higher speed tier whose monthly price remains under $400, add static IP and DDoS protection add-ons, keep the shortest available contract term that meets the price limit, and save the updated plan.
